package rulefixtures

// scenario for three_index_slice_for_append_safety: `sub := original[a:b]` followed by `sub = append(sub, ...)` with no capacity bound
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule679NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario679Negative(records []Rule679NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
